install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist', download=True); torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar', download=True); print('Data downloaded OK')"

python -c "import torchvision; ds = torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist'); print(f'MNIST: {len(ds)} samples'); ds2 = torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar'); print(f'CIFAR-10: {len(ds2)} samples')"
